titleStmt.title: SII 29.23: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 23. (A.R. No. 80 of 1961-62.) KOLANUPĀKA, BHUVANAGIRI TALUK, NALGONDA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar No. 1-pillar dugout from the main street in the village.

When Chālukya Trailōkyamalladēva was ruling over the empire from Kollāpura and mahāmandaḷēśvara Kommaṇayyarasa was administering Koḷḷipāke-7000 it seems records that some taxes were remitted by the seṭṭis, gāmuṇḍas and the prajes of Koḷḷipāke. The record was written by Jakkarāja.
The record is dated Śaka 969 Vyaya, Chaitra, śu. 1, Monday. It corresponds to 1046 A.D., March 11, Tuesday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhuva
nāśraya śrīpṛthvīva
llabhamahārājādhirā
ja paramēśvara parama
bhaṭṭāraka satyāśraya ku
ḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābhara
ṇa śrīmatraiḷōkyama
lladēvarsa kolāpu
rada nelevīḍinoḷu sukha
saṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rā
jyābhivṛddhi pravarddha
mānamācaṁdrārkaṁ
saluttamire tatpāda
padmōpajīvi svastisa
masta bhuvanavallabha
śrīmatraiḷōkyama
lla vallabhaprasādā
sādita mahāma
ṇḍaḷēśvara

vi maṇḍitaṁ
calamaṟi
vātaṁ suja
na cūḍāma
ṇi mārbbala
gaṇḍanayya
na gandavāra
ṇa narila(rā)
ma śrīmanma
hā maṇḍaḷē
śvara kommaṇa
yyarasaṁ ko
ḷipāke ye
ḻchāsira mu
ma nāḷutta
viḻdu saka
varṣa

969 neya vya
ya saṁvatsarada
caitra suda 1 sō
mavāradandu ko
ḷḷipākeyaṁ ca
ttuppurakkaṁ ma(paṁ)ñca
maṭha sthānakkaṁ A
ṟuva seṭṭiyara
nagarakkaṁ pannirbba
rggāmuṇḍa moda
lāgi samastavā
da prajegā(muṇḍa)
diya
yanācaṁdrārkkaṁ
bara biṭṭar .

sāmānyōyaṁ
dharmasētu nṛ
pāṇāṁ kāḷe kā
ḷe pāḷaniyō
bhavadbhissarvvā
nētānbāvina pā
rthivēṁdrā bhū
yō bhūyō
yācatē rāma
bhadraḥ . svadattāṁ
paradattāṁ vāyō
harēti vasundharāṁ
ṣaṣṭirvvariṣa sa
hasrāṇi viṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē
krimiḥ . jakkarā
ja baredōn .
Digital edition of SII 29.23 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
